diagrams.title: Disk Structure and Head Movement
diagrams.description: Shows the physical layout of a disk with tracks, sectors, and the read/write head assembly moving across tracks
diagrams.purpose: Understand physical disk structure and how seek time occurs due to head movement between tracks

diagrams.title: FCFS Algorithm Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows request servicing in order of arrival - head jumps randomly based on when requests arrived
elements: Head movement path showing chronological order
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how FCFS makes no optimization, resulting in excessive head movement

diagrams.title: SSTF Algorithm Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows head always moving to nearest request - demonstrates efficiency but potential starvation
elements: Distance to each pending request shown
Starvation zone visualization (distant requests never selected)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how SSTF optimizes but can neglect distant requests indefinitely

diagrams.title: SCAN (Elevator) Algorithm
diagrams.description: Shows head moving end-to-end like an elevator, servicing all requests in path then reversing
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the elevator-like behavior and understand why SCAN avoids starvation
